services

deep energy retrofits and extensions

At Retrofit Construction, we manage comprehensive deep energy retrofits as general contractors, ensuring your building meets the highest standards of efficiency, sustainability, and craftsmanship. Our approach starts with the building envelope—enhancing airtightness, insulation, and high-performance windows. We then focus on mechanical systems, ensuring proper ventilation and clean energy sources, with energy production considered only when it adds value. Deep energy retrofits require a full-building approach; piecemeal upgrades won’t achieve the results you need. We oversee every aspect to meet certifications like Passive House, EnerPHit, Net Zero, and Net Zero Ready. Beyond energy efficiency, we ensure that visible finishes, both inside and out, are executed with the same meticulous attention to detail as the work behind the walls. Every detail matters. As general contractors, we track the budget and schedule closely, keeping you informed at every stage. Understanding that these projects are significant investments, we deliver results with professionalism, ensuring completion on time and within budget. Our goal is to create sustainable, energy-efficient spaces that stand the test of time.

developments

At Retrofit Construction, our developments are an extension of our expertise in retrofitting, going beyond traditional construction. We begin by identifying properties with strong retrofit potential and then manage every aspect of the project, from ideation and design to commissioning. Each development is meticulously curated to meet the highest standards of sustainability and performance. Innovation is at the heart of our approach, driving us to create buildings that are as efficient as they are forward-thinking. With a long-term vision for sustainability and resilience, we ensure that the buildings we develop are prepared to meet the challenges of tomorrow. Every detail is carefully planned and executed, reflecting our commitment to delivering more than just construction.

consultation

Our consultancy services support contractors and building owners in achieving high-performance results at any project stage. We provide tailored guidance to ensure your project meets the highest standards of sustainability and efficiency. From assessing retrofit potential during development to integrating high-performance details in design and overseeing meticulous execution in construction, we ensure optimal outcomes. Recognizing that we can’t take on every project, our consultancy empowers you with the knowledge and strategies needed to navigate the complexities of high-performance construction. This approach extends our impact, helping more clients achieve exceptional results.

envelope sealing specialist

Airtightness and proper insulation are critical to high-performance buildings, and our Envelope Sealing Specialist service ensures these elements are executed with precision. We expertly apply membranes and tapes to create a continuous, airtight seal and manage whole building insulation to maximize energy efficiency. When it comes to envelope perforations like windows and mechanical penetrations, proper installation is as crucial as product quality. High-performance windows, in particular, must be installed correctly to deliver their full efficiency and durability. This phase is about getting everything inside the walls right the first time, as these components will be concealed for years. Our meticulous approach ensures that every detail contributes to an envelope that not only meets but exceeds industry standards.
